official_release.relationship_to_paper: This pinned monorepo commit postdates arXiv v2 and must be inspected as later release evidence, not treated as the exact paper-time implementation.

tagged_release.relationship_to_paper: The v1.0.0 tag was created three days after arXiv v2 and is the closest named release preserved for comparison; timing alone does not establish exact manuscript-code identity.

acquisition_scope: The immutable v2 PDF was downloaded and converted to layout-preserving full text. Beginning, methods/results-region, and appendix/end samples were inspected to verify coherent extraction through page 28. Both official GitHub archives were downloaded and ZIP-tested; counts and hashes were recorded. This is source acquisition, not a deep review or a claim that the releases were read completely.
local_storage_note: The PDF and large release ZIPs are intentionally ignored local evidence; the extracted text, index entry, and this provenance record are versioned. Re-fetch archives from the recorded immutable URLs and verify SHA-256 when absent locally.
